first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning is substantively the same across both evaluations. The concerns raised in the variant (overqualification, limited domain experience, on-site presence) are all present in the baseline evaluation. The minor differences in phrasing and emphasis fall within the expected range of run-to-run noise and do not reflect any new concerns or logic tied to the candidate's change in location.
